regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: Fraunhofer IVV LCA commissioned; preliminary Class C for PE/EVOH bread bags.

regulations.title: Verpackungsdurchführungsgesetz Amendment
regulations.summary: Consultation period to 31 March 2026; Bundesrat vote May 2026; EPR multiplier modelling in progress.

regulations.title: Austrian EPR — ARA Registration
regulations.summary: ARA registered 3 December 2025 (AT-EPR-2025-08847); EUR 16,840/year contribution; Q1 payment EUR 4,210 due January 2026.

regulations.title: Lieferkettensorgfaltspflichtengesetz
regulations.summary: 1,037 German employees confirmed; Freshfields engaged; palm oil supply chain risk assessment underway.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: KPMG Munich confirmed large undertaking; DMA begins January 2026; E1, S1, S2 priority topics.
